Breadcrumbs

Navigation breadcrumb trail showing the user's current location within a page hierarchy. Uses semantic <nav> + <ol> with ARIA landmark. Variants: 2–6 items, 3 sizes, with overflow ellipsis support.

Navigation Figma Synced 5 Item Counts × 3 Sizes
2 Items
  1. Home
  3. Settings
HTML
<nav class="zc-breadcrumb" aria-label="Breadcrumb">
  <ol>
    <li class="zc-breadcrumb-item"><a href="#">Home</a></li>
    <li class="zc-breadcrumb-separator">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 10 10">
        <path d="M3.5 1.5l3.5 3.5-3.5 3.5" stroke="currentColor"
              stroke-width="1.2" stroke-linecap="round"
              stroke-linejoin="round"/>
      </svg>
    </li>
    <li class="zc-breadcrumb-item zc-breadcrumb-current"
        aria-current="page"><span>Settings</span></li>
  </ol>
</nav>
SCSS
.zc-breadcrumb {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  font-family: 'ZohoPuvi', sans-serif;
}
.zc-breadcrumb-item a {
  color: var(--zc-color-primary-text-default);
  text-decoration: none;
  padding: 4px 6px;
  border-radius: var(--zc-radius-s);
  &:hover {
    color: var(--zc-color-primary-text-default-hover);
    background: var(--zc-color-primary-surface-subtle);
  }
}
.zc-breadcrumb-current {
  color: var(--zc-color-huegrey-text-bold);
  font-weight: 600;
}
3 Items
  1. Home
  3. Components
  5. Breadcrumbs
HTML
<nav class="zc-breadcrumb" aria-label="Breadcrumb">
  <ol>
    <li class="zc-breadcrumb-item"><a href="#">Home</a></li>
    <li class="zc-breadcrumb-separator"><svg>...</svg></li>
    <li class="zc-breadcrumb-item"><a href="#">Components</a></li>
    <li class="zc-breadcrumb-separator"><svg>...</svg></li>
    <li class="zc-breadcrumb-item zc-breadcrumb-current"
        aria-current="page"><span>Breadcrumbs</span></li>
  </ol>
</nav>
4 Items
  1. Home
  3. Application
  5. Components
  7. Breadcrumbs
HTML
<nav class="zc-breadcrumb" aria-label="Breadcrumb">
  <ol>
    <li class="zc-breadcrumb-item"><a href="#">Home</a></li>
    <li class="zc-breadcrumb-separator"><svg>...</svg></li>
    <li class="zc-breadcrumb-item"><a href="#">Application</a></li>
    <li class="zc-breadcrumb-separator"><svg>...</svg></li>
    <li class="zc-breadcrumb-item"><a href="#">Components</a></li>
    <li class="zc-breadcrumb-separator"><svg>...</svg></li>
    <li class="zc-breadcrumb-item zc-breadcrumb-current"
        aria-current="page"><span>Breadcrumbs</span></li>
  </ol>
</nav>
5 Items
  1. Home
  3. Application
  5. Components
  7. Navigation
  9. Breadcrumbs
HTML
<!-- 5-item breadcrumb -->
<nav class="zc-breadcrumb" aria-label="Breadcrumb">
  <ol>
    <li class="zc-breadcrumb-item"><a href="#">Home</a></li>
    <li class="zc-breadcrumb-separator"><svg>...</svg></li>
    <li class="zc-breadcrumb-item"><a href="#">Application</a></li>
    <li class="zc-breadcrumb-separator"><svg>...</svg></li>
    <li class="zc-breadcrumb-item"><a href="#">Components</a></li>
    <li class="zc-breadcrumb-separator"><svg>...</svg></li>
    <li class="zc-breadcrumb-item"><a href="#">Navigation</a></li>
    <li class="zc-breadcrumb-separator"><svg>...</svg></li>
    <li class="zc-breadcrumb-item zc-breadcrumb-current"
        aria-current="page"><span>Breadcrumbs</span></li>
  </ol>
</nav>
6 Items
  1. Home
  3. Application
  5. Workspace
  7. Components
  9. Navigation
  11. Breadcrumbs
HTML
<!-- 6-item breadcrumb -->
<nav class="zc-breadcrumb" aria-label="Breadcrumb">
  <ol>
    <li class="zc-breadcrumb-item"><a href="#">Home</a></li>
    <li class="zc-breadcrumb-separator"><svg>...</svg></li>
    <li class="zc-breadcrumb-item"><a href="#">Application</a></li>
    <li class="zc-breadcrumb-separator"><svg>...</svg></li>
    <li class="zc-breadcrumb-item"><a href="#">Workspace</a></li>
    <li class="zc-breadcrumb-separator"><svg>...</svg></li>
    <li class="zc-breadcrumb-item"><a href="#">Components</a></li>
    <li class="zc-breadcrumb-separator"><svg>...</svg></li>
    <li class="zc-breadcrumb-item"><a href="#">Navigation</a></li>
    <li class="zc-breadcrumb-separator"><svg>...</svg></li>
    <li class="zc-breadcrumb-item zc-breadcrumb-current"
        aria-current="page"><span>Breadcrumbs</span></li>
  </ol>
</nav>
Size Variants
Small
  1. Home
  3. Components
  5. Breadcrumbs
Base (Default)
  1. Home
  3. Components
  5. Breadcrumbs
Large
  1. Home
  3. Components
  5. Breadcrumbs
HTML
<!-- Small -->
<nav class="zc-breadcrumb zc-breadcrumb-sm" aria-label="Breadcrumb">...</nav>

<!-- Base (default) -->
<nav class="zc-breadcrumb" aria-label="Breadcrumb">...</nav>

<!-- Large -->
<nav class="zc-breadcrumb zc-breadcrumb-lg" aria-label="Breadcrumb">...</nav>
Overflow with Ellipsis
Collapsed
  1. Home
  3. ...
  5. Navigation
  7. Breadcrumbs
HTML
<!-- Overflow: collapsed middle items -->
<nav class="zc-breadcrumb" aria-label="Breadcrumb">
  <ol>
    <li class="zc-breadcrumb-item"><a href="#">Home</a></li>
    <li class="zc-breadcrumb-separator"><svg>...</svg></li>
    <li class="zc-breadcrumb-item">
      <span class="zc-breadcrumb-overflow"
            title="Show more">...</span>
    </li>
    <li class="zc-breadcrumb-separator"><svg>...</svg></li>
    <li class="zc-breadcrumb-item"><a href="#">Navigation</a></li>
    <li class="zc-breadcrumb-separator"><svg>...</svg></li>
    <li class="zc-breadcrumb-item zc-breadcrumb-current"
        aria-current="page"><span>Breadcrumbs</span></li>
  </ol>
</nav>
